---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve OpenPublisher
title: "[BUG]"
labels: bug
assignees: rmellis

---

**Expected behavior**
<!-- A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen. -->

**Screenshots or Screen Recordings**
<!-- If applicable, add screenshots or a short video to help explain your problem. Since OpenPublisher is a visual layout tool, this is highly recommended! -->

**Sample Document (.opub)**
<!-- If this bug happens with a specific layout or document, please zip your `.opub` file and attach it here so we can reproduce it exactly. -->

**Environment (please complete the following information):**
 - **OS:** [e.g. Windows 11, macOS Sonoma, Ubuntu 22.04]
 - **Platform/Installation Method:** [e.g. Windows Portable .exe, macOS App, Linux .AppImage, or Web Browser]
 - **Browser (if using the web version):** [e.g. Chrome, Firefox, Safari]

**Additional context**
<!-- Add any other context about the problem here, such as if you were importing a legacy file, or if you noticed anything in the startup splash screen logs. -->
